message:
feat(stdio): implement native flockfile/funlockfile for NativeFile streams (bd-9chy.17)

Add proper per-FILE locking for stdin/stdout/stderr using NativeFile's
ReentrantMutex. Key changes:

- Add StreamType enum and classify_stream_for_locking() helper
- flockfile/funlockfile now call NativeFile.explicit_lock/unlock for native streams
- ftrylockfile returns 0 on success, -1 when lock held by another thread
- LegacyStdioStream treated as no-op (no mutex support)
- Foreign streams delegate to host glibc

Add stress tests proving correctness:
- 32 threads writing 1024 records each without torn writes
- Recursive locking (nested flockfile) doesn't deadlock
- ftrylockfile returns correct values
- Record atomicity verified via checksum

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
